data.title: Nomura's Laser Digital Holdings Reduces Crypto Exposure Amid Market Volatility
data.description: Nomura Holdings' European digital asset subsidiary, Laser Digital Holdings, is reducing its exposure to cryptocurrency assets. According to PANews, this decision comes after the company experienced losses in the third quarter due to market fluctuations. Hiroshi Morinouchi, Nomura's Chief Financial Officer, stated during a financial briefing that the firm is implementing strict position management to mitigate risks. Despite these adjustments, Morinouchi emphasized that Nomura remains committed to its digital asset ventures and plans to expand its operations in the medium to long term.

data.title: The United States announced new sanctions against Iran.
data.description: On January 30 local time, the U.S. Treasury Department's Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) issued a notice updating its counterterrorism and counterproliferation sanctions list related to Iran, adding several high-ranking individuals from Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) and law enforcement system to the "Specially Designated Nationals" (SDN) list. The notice indicates that the newly added individuals include commanders of the IRGC in several Iranian provinces, heads of the IRGC's intelligence organization, and high-ranking officials in law enforcement. Most of these individuals also face the risk of secondary sanctions. (CCTV News)

data.title: U.S. Military Slows Transfer of ISIS Detainees to Iraq
data.description: The U.S. military has reportedly slowed the transfer of ISIS detainees to Iraq this week. According to Jin10, Iraq is seeking additional time to prepare its prison facilities and negotiate with other countries regarding the repatriation of detainees.

data.title: Significant Increase in ETH and HYPE Holdings Observed
data.description: On January 30, a notable increase in ETH and HYPE holdings was observed. According to BlockBeats, HyperInsight monitoring revealed that 'Maji' has been consistently adding to its long positions in ETH and HYPE. The recent additions include 1,080 ETH and 8,888.88 HYPE, with further accumulation ongoing. As of the report's release, the value of these new long positions has approached $5 million.

data.title: Anonymous Transfer of 10,000 BNB to Wintermute Reported
data.description: At 23:20, an anonymous address beginning with 0xB0Ea transferred 10,000 BNB to Wintermute. According to ChainCatcher, the transaction was noted by Arkham data. The transfer highlights ongoing activity in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Ethereum Veterans to Transform Recovery Funds into Staked Endowment
data.description: Ethereum veterans are set to convert approximately 75,000 ETH from decade-old recovery funds into a staked endowment aimed at financing smart contract security across Ethereum and its layer-2 ecosystem. According to NS3.AI, this fund originates from leftover balances following TheDAO 2016 hard fork and is expected to generate an annual yield of $7.8 to $11.1 million. This yield will support ongoing security efforts without the need to liquidate the principal. The initiative signifies a shift towards institutional-scale security funding, reinforcing Ethereum's goal of becoming a global financial platform.

data.title: Brother Machi's initial deposit of 144,000 USDC yesterday has resulted in a total loss. He has since deposited another 249,000 USDC and gone long.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, the 144,000 USDC deposited by Machi Dage into Hyperliquid yesterday has all resulted in a loss. Subsequently, Machi (0x021...382) deposited another 249,000 USDC to continue going long on ETH and HYPE. Currently, his holdings include 2,000 ETH, worth $5.47 million, and 10,889 HYPE, worth $318,000.

data.title: In the past 24 hours, the cryptocurrency market saw a total of $1.464 billion in liquidations across all platforms, with long positions accounting for $1.341 billion.
data.description: According to CoinGlass data monitoring, the total liquidation amount across the network in the past 24 hours reached $1.464 billion, of which $1.341 billion were long positions and $123 million were short positions. A total of 202,756 people were liquidated. Liquidations in the last hour totaled $34.2209 million, in the last four hours $63.1179 million, and in the last 12 hours $225 million. The largest single liquidation occurred on the HTX BTC-USDT trading pair, worth $80.5799 million.

data.title: The SEC and CFTC chairmen launched Project Crypto to unify crypto regulation.
data.description: According to the SEC's official website, SEC Chair Paul S. Atkins and CFTC Chairman Mike Selig officially launched the Project Crypto joint initiative on January 29 at CFTC headquarters. This initiative aims to harmonize the two agencies' regulatory standards for the crypto market in response to bipartisan market structure legislation currently being pushed forward by Congress. Paul S. Atkins stated that current regulatory models are ill-suited to the current state of technological convergence, and fragmented regulation has become a source of investor confusion rather than protection. Project Crypto will seek to establish a unified framework in areas such as trading, clearing, custody, and risk management, and will adhere to the principle of minimum effective dose for appropriate regulation. Furthermore, SEC staff have provided guidance over the past year on memecoin, stablecoins, mining, staking, and broker financial responsibility, and clarified that registered advisors and regulated funds can deposit crypto assets with specific state-licensed financial institutions. This initiative marks a shift in regulatory focus from enforcement-driven to rule-clarification, aiming to reduce compliance costs through interagency collaboration.

data.title: White House Economic Adviser Unfazed by Fed Chair Selection
data.description: The White House National Economic Council Director, Hassett, expressed no disappointment over not being chosen as the Federal Reserve Chair on January 30. According to BlockBeats, Hassett conveyed his sentiments regarding the selection process, indicating a lack of regret about the outcome.

data.title: PAXG Transfer from Null Address to Paxos Observed
data.description: A significant transfer of PAXG tokens has been reported. According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 23:03, a total of 9027.14 PAXG tokens were moved from a Null Address to Paxos. This transaction highlights ongoing activities within the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Significant WBTC Transfers to UXLINK Exploiter Identified
data.description:
Arkham data reveals that between 22:52 and 22:57, UXLINK Exploiter received multiple WBTC transfers totaling 140.54 WBTC. According to ChainCatcher, these transactions originated from CoW Protocol.

At 22:52, 31.38 WBTC were transferred from CoW Protocol to UXLINK Exploiter. Subsequently, at 22:54, 24.09 WBTC were sent, followed by another 24.06 WBTC at 22:55. Additionally, at 22:54, another transfer of 24.09 WBTC occurred. Finally, at 22:53, 36.43 WBTC were moved from CoW Protocol to UXLINK Exploiter.

data.title: Coinbase CEO: Tokenized shares will bring significant positive changes to the financial system.
data.description: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong stated in an article on the X platform that tokenized stocks will bring significant positive changes to the financial system, and this trend will materialize in the near future. The United States is at the forefront of this field.

data.title: WLFI Tokens Face Trading Restrictions Amid Investor Concerns
data.description:
WLFI tokens, associated with the Trump family's World Liberty Financial initiative, experienced an initial surge but have left investors in a difficult position. According to NS3.AI, only 20% of these tokens are tradable, with the creators retaining control over sell permissions. Over the past five months, WLFI's value has decreased by 54%, leading frustrated investors to describe the situation as akin to being held hostage.

The project, which was initially marketed as a means to democratize finance, has primarily benefited its founders through profits from stablecoins. Meanwhile, promises of financial democratization remain unfulfilled, and the initiative is facing increasing regulatory scrutiny.

data.title: Amboss Technologies Launches RailsX for Bitcoin and Stablecoin Trading
data.description:
Amboss Technologies has introduced RailsX, a peer-to-peer platform built on the Lightning Network, designed for trading Bitcoin and stablecoins. According to BlockBeats, RailsX is constructed using native FPGA technology and facilitates atomic cross-asset swaps through self-payment loops on Lightning Network channels. This allows Bitcoin and stablecoin holders to trade directly while retaining custody.

Additionally, RailsX collaborates with Magnolia and Bringin to enable connections with traditional banking systems in the United States and Europe, facilitating fiat currency exchanges.

data.title: Paradex: DIME token TGE is scheduled for airdrop in late February or early March, with the airdrop share increased to 25%.
data.description: Paradex announced the official end of XP Season 2 and confirmed that the DIME token generation event will take place in the last week of February or the first week of March, following the Lunar New Year. Paradex confirmed that 25% of the total DIME supply will be airdropped to all XP holders and will be fully unlocked upon release. The allocation to Season 2 XP holders has increased from the original 15% to 20%, while the allocation to preseason and Season 1 holders remains unchanged at 5%. XP Season 3 will begin on February 1st, focusing on spot trading, real-world asset perpetual contracts, and options markets.

data.title: Amboss: Launches RailsX, a P2P decentralized exchange based on the Lightning Network.
data.description: Amboss announced the launch of RailsX, the first Lightning-native P2P decentralized exchange, at the PlanB forum in El Salvador. Utilizing Lightning Network and Taproot Assets technology, the platform enables users to conduct large-scale trading of Bitcoin and stablecoins in a self-custodial manner. RailsX achieves atomic cross-asset swaps through recurring self-payments via Lightning channels, without requiring the deployment of a new blockchain. Furthermore, RailsX integrates with the liquidity market Magma and partners with Magnolia and Bringin to support fiat currency deposits and withdrawals through European and American banks. The project aims to leverage Lightning Network stablecoins to access the $9.5 trillion daily trading volume of the foreign exchange market, promoting Bitcoin as a global medium of exchange.

data.title: BGB is now listed on the compliant US exchange Kraken and spot trading is available.
data.description: According to official news, Bitget Token (BGB) has been listed on Kraken and is now available for spot trading. As the first compliant US trading platform to list BGB, Kraken provides a more direct and transparent trading channel for institutional and retail users in Europe and the US, helping to further improve BGB's market liquidity and compliance accessibility. BGB serves as the gas and governance token for the Morph public blockchain and is integrated with Bitget and Bitget Wallet, supporting diverse application scenarios such as Launchpool staking, governance, and payments.
